programme.title: Bandits, (2001, Comedy)
programme.desc: The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: Double Jeopardy, (1999, Thriller)
programme.desc: Libby Parsons, who discovers that the husband she’s convicted of murdering staged his own “death” and framed her for the crime. Released on parole, she skips town to find him–and that puts parole officer Travis Lehman on her trail.

programme.title: Kill The Irishman, (2011, Action)
programme.desc: Oscar®-winner Christopher Walken, Val Kilmer, and Ray Stevenson star in KILL THE IRISHMAN, the true story of a tough Irish thug working for mobsters in Cleveland during the 1970s.

programme.title: The Boondock Saints, (1999, Thriller)
programme.desc: Two Irish Catholic brothers become vigilantes and wipe out Boston's criminal underworld in the name of God.

programme.title: The Boondock Saints II: All Saints Day, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: The MacManus brothers have been in hiding with their father, Il Duce, in the quiet valleys of Ireland. When word comes that a beloved priest has been killed, the brothers return to Boston to mount a bloody crusade to bring justice to those responsible.

programme.title: Double Jeopardy, (1999, Thriller)
programme.desc: Libby Parsons, who discovers that the husband she’s convicted of murdering staged his own “death” and framed her for the crime. Released on parole, she skips town to find him–and that puts parole officer Travis Lehman on her trail.

programme.title: Better Luck Tomorrow, (2003, Thriller)
programme.desc: To his classmates and teachers, high-schooler Ben Manibag appears to be the model student: a perfectionist and overachiever. But underneath this persona is a darker side. Ben and his bored high-school buddies lead double lives.

programme.title: Echo Boomers, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: Michael Shannon stars in this gripping crime-thriller. When Lance Zutterland leaves school in mounting debt, he is pulled into a criminal operation made up of rebellious college graduates who steal from the rich and give back to themselves.

programme.title: D.A.R.Y.L., (1985, Adventure)
programme.desc: A young boy is found wandering without any memory of who he is. A family takes him in and begin to look for clues to help him find his way home.

programme.title: The Killing, (1956, Action)
programme.desc: With fascinating detail, Stanley Kubrick lays bare the intricate inner-planning of a racetrack heist by a deadly mastermind (Sterling Hayden) and his crew. Co-stars Coleen Gray.

programme.title: Star Trek, (2009, Adventure)
programme.desc: The greatest adventure of all time begins with Star Trek, the incredible story of a young crew's maiden voyage onboard the most advanced starship ever created: the U.S.S. Enterprise.

programme.title: The Girl with All the Gifts, (2017, Action)
programme.desc: Six-time Academy Award® nominee Glenn Close stars in a post-apocalyptic story about a devastating disease that eradicates free will and turns its victims into flesh-eating 'hungries.'

programme.title: Arrival, (2016, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, an elite team - led by expert translator Louise Banks (Academy Award® nominee Amy Adams) – races against time to decipher their intent.

programme.title: Annihilation, (2018, Thriller)
programme.desc: A biologist and former solider (Natalie Portman) must lead a mission into a mysterious quarantine zone known as The Shimmer, a beautiful but deadly world of mutated landscapes and creatures that threatens all life on Earth. Also starring Oscar Isaac.

programme.title: Cruel Intentions, (1999, Romance)
programme.desc: Two vicious step-siblings of an elite Manhattan prep school make a wager: to deflower the new headmaster's daughter before the start of term.

programme.title: Bones And All, (2022, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: In a world that cannot abide who they truly are, a young woman who is learning how to survive on the margins of society and an intense, disenfranchised drifter embark upon a road trip, searching for identity and chasing beauty in a perilous world.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer, (1997, Slashers and Serial Killers)
programme.desc: After an accident on a winding road, four teens make the fatal mistake of dumping their victim's body into the sea. But exactly one year later, the dead man returns from his watery grave, and he's looking for more than an apology.

programme.title: I Still Know What You Did Last Summer, (1998, Slashers and Serial Killers)
programme.desc: Remember Ben Willis? He's the fisherman who killed the boy who was driving the car when it went off the road in the fatal accident that killed his daughter, Sara... he's the man in the slicker with a hook in his hand... well, he's back.

programme.title: Idle Hands, (1999, Comedy)
programme.desc: The devil will find work for idle hands to do, but what happens when he chooses the laziest teen slacker in the world to do his dirty work? Anton Tobias is a couch potato burn-out who can't control the murderous impulses of his possessed hand. Rated: R

programme.title: The Faculty, (1998, Teen Screams)
programme.desc: A group of small-town high school students discovers their teachers are under the control of mind-controlling alien parasites. From a smart script by Kevin Williamson (SCREAM), and directed by action-expert Robert Rodriguez (FROM DUSK TO DAWN).

programme.title: The Crush, (1995, Thriller)
programme.desc: A journalist becomes the unwanted center of attention for a 14-year-old girl, who proceeds to sabotage his life after he refuses her sexual advances.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility, (1995, Romance)
programme.desc: Emma Thompson stars in the captivating romance based on Jane Austen's classic novel of two sisters' search for love in strict Victorian society.

programme.title: Titanic, (1997, Romance)
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio and Oscar-nominee Kate Winslet light up the screen as Jack and Rose, the young lovers who find one another on the maiden voyage of the "unsinkable" R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.title: The First Wives Club, (1996, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Join the Club - The First Wives Club, the good-time battle-of-the-sexes satire sparked by snappy one-liners, great physical-comedy gags and three unforgettable stars in top form, Bette Midler, Goldie Hawn and Diane Keaton.

programme.title: Manhattan, (1979, Romance)
programme.desc: Woody Allen, Diane Keaton, Meryl Streep and Mariel Hemingway star in Woody Allen's extraordinary and funny film that explores the embattled life and loves of a successful New York comedy writer.

programme.title: Grease, (1978, Musical)
programme.desc: Grease is the one that you want! Go back to high school with Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), leader of the bad-boy T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), and a rockin' and rollin' all-star cast.

programme.title: Good Guys Wear Black, (1978, Action)
programme.desc: Action superstar Chuck Norris stars as John T. Booker, the former leader of an elite commando unit who must uncover the reason why his former squad members are being systematically murdered one by one. Anne Archer and James Franciscus co-star.

programme.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers, (1978, Sci-Fi Horror)
programme.desc: This dazzling remake of the 1956 spine-tingler stars Donald Sutherland, Brooke Adams, Jeff Goldblum, Leonard Nimoy and Veronica Cartwright in an eerie tale of possession by "alien pods."

programme.title: Mad Max, (1980, Action)
programme.desc: Max and the gang's worlds converge when the gang wants Max as badly as he wants them, especially after they target him for the death of their former leader.

programme.title: King Kong, (1976, Adventure)
programme.desc: A petroleum exploration expedition comes to an isolated island and encounters a colossal giant gorilla.

programme.title: Grease, (1978, Musical)
programme.desc: Grease is the one that you want! Go back to high school with Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), leader of the bad-boy T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), and a rockin' and rollin' all-star cast.

programme.title: Hair, (1979, Musical)
programme.desc: A country boy and Vietnam draftee embark on an adventure of a lifetime when he meets a group of counterculture hippies and his eyes are opened to the darker side of class, race, and big city life in this adaptation of the Broadway sensation.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: In the End, Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma must outduel his math teacher before his life points are subtracted and the virus planted in the city’s computer system goes viral.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Flipping Out, Part 1
programme.desc: When fellow classmate Flip offers Yuma an Xyz Monster, Tori and Bronk warn Yuma to stay clear of this two-faced trouble maker.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Flipping Out, Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma must figure out a way to defeat Flip or risk losing his Utopia card… and Astral forever!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Sparrow, Part 1
programme.desc: When Nelson Andrews, star of the hit TV series “The Sparrow,“ becomes possessed by a Number Card, Yuma challenges him to a duel, putting Astral’s safety on the line.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Sparrow, Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma must figure out a way to defeat The Sparrow and his powerful Galaxy Queen before Nelson and Astral disappear forever!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Feline Frenzy
programme.desc: In order to find his missing friend Tori, Yuma must face off against a feline fanatic who has the purr-fect answers to his every move.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Shark Attack
programme.desc: Yuma discovers that Shark has started running with the wrong crowd and given up dueling. Can Yuma hook Shark back into battling, or are Shark's dueling days done forever?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Pack, Part 1
programme.desc: When Yuma learns that Shark is going to be set up to take the fall for stealing a priceless deck, Yuma challenges Shark’s thug friends to a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Pack, Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma and Shark’s tag team battle against The Pack reaches a fevery pitch, for if Yuma loses, he also loses Utopia!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Number Hunter, Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma and Astral face their toughest battle ever when they are forced to duel a mysterious individual who hunts Number Cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Number Hunter, Part 2
programme.desc: As the back-and-forth battle between Yuma and the mysterious Number Hunter continues, Yuma must duel like he’s never dueled before if he wants to save Astral, his Number Cards and his soul!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Training Days, Part 1
programme.desc: The legendary Dark Magician and Blue-Eyes White Dragon come out of retirement when a wise old man named Master Roku challenges Yuma to a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Training Days, Part 2
programme.desc: After challenging Master Roku’s former student to a duel, Yuma relies on his master’s teachings in order to defeat the evil Kaze and save the Duel Sanctuary’s Legendary Deck!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: It’s in the Cards, Part 1
programme.desc: When a mysterious fortune teller agrees to help out Yuma’s friends, they soon find themselves in a terrifying situation. Can Yuma rescue his pals, or will the all-knowing Fortuno see to it that Yuma fails?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: It’s in the Cards, Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma must figure out a way to defeat the mysterious and all-knowing Fortuno if he wants to save his friends, his Number Card and his soul!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Edge of the World
programme.desc: While on the way to School Spirit Day, Yuma realizes the Golden Key his father gave him is missing. As Astral and Yuma retrace his steps, Yuma shares the exciting story behind the Golden Key’s origins.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Roots of the Problem
programme.desc: When Yuma gets into a fight with Bronk, their friendship is soon put to the ultimate test when an evil Number Card takes control of Yuma.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Battle With the Bot
programme.desc: Yuma befriends a broken Litterbot only to discover that it has been programmed to do the dirty work for a wanted jewel thief. Can Yuma put a stop to this thief’s thieving ways, or will Yuma’s newest friend trash his plan to stop him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Shark Hunter
programme.desc: Shark tries to stop Kite from stealing Yuma’s Golden Key by challenging him to a duel. Can Shark sink his teeth into Kite’s life points and save Yuma’s prized possession, or will Kite’s cunning skills sink any chance Shark has of winning?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Hunting Down the Hunter, Part 1
programme.desc: With his Golden Key in Kite’s possession, Yuma must hunt down the Number Hunter if he ever wants to see Astral again.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Hunting Down the Hunter, Part 2
programme.desc: While Yuma continues to search for Astral and the Golden Key, while Astral looks for a way to defeat Kite and save all his Number Cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: When an unexpected phenomenon stops time, Kite is able to gain the upper hand by tapping into Astral's memories and witnessing firsthand the battles that he and Yuma have fought together.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Let the Duels Begin
programme.desc: With the World Duel Carnival about to begin, Yuma gets set to take on the best duelists from around the world… that is, until he realizes he never entered. Can Yuma figure out a way to join the Carnival, or will Yuma’s efforts fall short?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Team Performance
programme.desc: The World Duel Carnival kicks off when Yuma is challenged by Striker, a soccer player turned duelist who has one goal in mind: victory.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Heavy Metal
programme.desc: Yuma rises up to the challenge of a pint-sized duelist and his deck of monster machines.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Love Hurts
programme.desc: Yuma broke Anna’s heart years ago, and now she’s back for revenge. If Yuma loses, he has to be Anna’s boyfriend forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: No Tomato
programme.desc: Yuma faces his toughest test to date when he challenges the tomato loving Tombo to a duel. Can Yuma overcome his hate for tomatoes and be victorious, or will his taste buds only be serving up defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Life Is a Carnival, Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma gets taken for a wild ride when Kari's friend steals an extremely lucky card from the local museum. Relying on pure skill, Yuma must figure out a way to beat the luckiest guy in the world.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Life Is a Carnival, Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma’s duel atop an out-of-control monorail takes a turn for the worse when his opponent plays a Number Card that guarantees a win every time.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Foolish Fans
programme.desc: It's a dream come true for Caswell and Bronk when their favorite duelist in the world challenges them to a duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Shark Bait
programme.desc: Shark looks to sink his teeth into a duel with Quattro, but instead gets hooked into an underwater battle with Quattro’s sinister sibling.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Bad Developments, Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma hunts down a photographer whose pictures can predict the future. Unfortunately for Yuma and his friend Tori, it’s a future that’s not so bright.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Bad Developments, Part 2
programme.desc: Tori’s future is up in the air when the damaged airship she is on takes a turn for the worse - just as Yuma’s opponent Cameron predicted! Can Yuma save his best friend by winning his duel, or are the future photos Cameron snapped set in stone?

programme.title: Robin ventures into the forest in search of ancient secrets, Zoro takes to the water for a slicing, dicing showdown with Hordy Jones, and Luffy is branded a royal kidnapper by an angry mob of fish folk!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: KEEP SHIRAHOSHI SAFE! DECKEN CLOSE BEHIND!

programme.title: Luffy, Chopper, and Sanji are taken prisoner by a fish mob just as Vander Decken launches an attack the princess! Elsewhere, Zoro continues his battle with Hordy, and Nami hitches a ride on a mermaid to escape the crumbling palace!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE STRAW HATS DEFEATED?! HORDY GAINS CONTROL OF THE RYUGU PALACE!

programme.title: Zoro and Neptune fight bravely, but they're no match for Hordy and his pill-popping minions. Back at the ship, Luffy reunites with Jimbei, who reveals something sinister about his past.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE HAUNTING TIES! NAMI AND THE FISHMAN PIRATES!

programme.title: The New Fish-Man Pirates continue their bloody and violent uprising, and Jimbei begins the story of how he unleashed the monster known as Arlong on the unsuspecting citizens of the East Blue.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A HERO WHO FREED THE SLAVES! AN ADVENTURER TIGER!

programme.title: Jimbei continues his story with tales of fish-men taken as slaves, Queen Otohime's fierce devotion to her people, the legend of Fisher Tiger, and the sinister rise of Arlong.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: KIZARU APPEARS! A TRAP TO CATCH TIGER!

programme.title: Arlong's violent tendencies are condemned by Fisher Tiger, and the arrival of a young human girl teaches the Fish-Man Pirates a lesson in compassion.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Team is Formed! Save Chopper

programme.title: The great pirate Fisher Tiger keeps his promise to a young slave girl, but the adults in her village are determined to make him pay for his act of honor.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE DEATH OF THE HERO! A SHOCKING TRUTH OF TIGER!

programme.title: In the wake of Fisher Tiger's tragic death, the once-mighty Sun Pirates are splintered by an ongoing quarrel between Jimbei and Arlong. Meanwhile, Queen Otohime's ceasless quest to help her people begins to take its toll.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE SUN PIRATES SPLIT! JIMBEI VS. ARLONG!

programme.title: Tensions run high when a slave-owning Celestial Dragon washes up on Fish-Man Island. His former captives cry for out for blood, but Queen Otohime sees it as a chance to mend fences between the gilled and non-gilled!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: SHAKING FISHMAN ISLAND! A CELESTIAL DRAGON DRIFTS IN!

programme.title: After an agonizing absence, Queen Otohime returns to her people with exciting news. Unfortunately, a horrific act of violence derails the queen's mission and changes life on Fish-Man Island forever.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A SUDDEN TRAGEDY! A GUNSHOT SHUTS DOWN THE FUTURE!

programme.title: Jimbei reaches the heartbreaking conclusion in the story of Queen Otohime, Nami does something completely unexpected, and Hordy Jones makes a foreboding appearance!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: BACK TO THE PRESENT! HORDY MAKES A MOVE!

programme.title: Hordy announces his sinister plans for Fish-Man Island. Luffy and Shirahoshi are ready to fight, but Jimbei wants to wage this war on his own!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE KINGDOM IN SHOCK! AN ORDER TO EXECUTE NEPTUNE ISSUED!

programme.title: Luffy and Jimbei come to blows over how to handle Hordy's uprising. Back at the palace, Brook embarks on an out-of-body experience with hopes of saving his mates!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A RIFT OPENS UP! LUFFY VS. JIMBEI!

programme.title: Jimbei and Luffy continue their standoff, the New Fish-Man pirates go on a rampage, and Hordy begins to experience startling side effects from his pill-popping habit!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: SOMETHING HAS HAPPENED TO HORDY! THE TRUE POWER OF THE EVIL DRUG!

programme.title: Hordy's rampant use of the energy steroid makes him bigger, stronger, and scarier than ever before! The Fish-Man princes join the battle, but even they may not be strong enough to stop Hordy's onslaught!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE BATTLE IS ON! AT CONCHCORDE PLAZA!

programme.title: Jimbei and Shirahoshi are captured by the enemy, and Hordy makes a shocking revelation to the population of Fish-Man Island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A SURPRISING CONFESSION! THE TRUTH BEHIND THE ASSASSINATION OF OTOHIME!

programme.title: Shirahoshi reveals that she knew the truth about her mother's murder all along, and Luffy makes a bone-crushing entrance when the princess needs him most!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: SHIRAHOSHI'S TEARS! LUFFY FINALLY SHOWS UP!

programme.title: Hordy announces his plan for turning humans into slaves, the people of Fish-Man Island throw their support behind a new champion, and Luffy amazes even his own friends!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A BIG CLASH! THE STRAW HATS VS. A HUNDRED THOUSAND ENEMIES!

programme.title: Luffy and the gang show off how much stronger they've become by issuing a brutal beat down to Hordy and his ferocious Fish-Man Pirates! Can anything stop the Hats?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: DEADLY ATTACKS ONE AFTER ANOTHER! ZORO AND SANJI JOIN THE BATTLE!

programme.title: Hordy's men keep attacking, but the Straw Hats have new weapons at their disposal! Franky unleashes the fury of the Black Rhino, and Luffy turns the tables on Hordy with a little help from his Kraken!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: UNVEILED! THE SECRET WEAPONS OF THE SUNNY!

programme.title: Franky dazzles Usopp and Chopper by transforming into a gigantic fighting robot, Hordy tries to blackmail the Kraken, and Luffy introduces his fist to the Fish-man's face!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: IRON PIRATE! HERE COMES GENERAL FRANKY!

programme.title: Luffy shows off even more new powers as he brutally pummels Hordy, but the main attraction proves to be an ancient and immense pirate ship that's heading straight for Fish-Man Island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE NOAH CLOSING IN! THE FISHMAN ISLAND FACING DESTRUCTION!

programme.title: Shirahoshi summons the courage to risk everything to save her world, Luffy puts his own life in peril by venturing into the ocean, and Hordy's devious nature fully comes to the surface.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: HURRY UP, LUFFY! SHIRAHOSHI'S LIFE IN JEOPARDY!

programme.title: Luffy sets the stage for a final battle with Hordy, Sanji kicks a giant in defense of Nami's honor, and Zoro puts his blades to the ultimate test against a steroid-powered fighting fish!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE FIERCE FIGHT BEGINS! LUFFY VS. HORDY!

programme.title: While Luffy and Shirahoshi try to prevent Fish-Man Island from being crushed, the rest of the Straw Hats square off against the meanest Fish-Man Pirates in the deep blue sea!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A MASSIVE CONFUSED FIGHT! THE STRAW HATS VS. THE NEW FISHMAN PIRATES!

programme.title: Luffy is the only one who can stop Hordy, but he'll need air to survive the fight, so Shirahoshi's big brother risks his own life in a heroic attempt to get Luffy a bigger bubble!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: LUFFY LOSES THE FIGHT?! HORDY'S LONG-AWAITED REVENGE!

programme.title: While the rest of the Straw Hats continue to fight bravely, Luffy tries to find a way to save the island, and the horrible truth about Hordy's hatred for humans is finally revealed!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A SHOCKING FACT! THE TRUE IDENTITY OF HORDY!

programme.title: Hordy's twisted past takes center stage in a Fish-Man flashback. Meanwhile, Shirahoshi's brother begs Luffy to save his beloved homeland and wipe out the anti-human element!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: BACK TO ZERO! EARNEST WISHES FOR LUFFY!

programme.title: Luffy's fist of fire puts Hordy down for the count, and the rest of the Straw Hats try to make short work of the remaining Fish-Man Pirates. Meanwhile, a very big boat looms overhead!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: LUFFY'S ALL-OUT ATTACK! RED HAWK BLASTS!

programme.title: While the rest of the Straw Hats try to make short work of their enemies, Luffy summons the strength for one last brutal attack on Hordy. Now, about that giant boat…
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: COMING TO AN END! THE FINAL DECISIVE BATTLE AGAINST HORDY!

programme.title: After defeating Hordy, Luffy turns his attention to stopping the Noah from crushing Fish-Man Island. Straw Hats and Fish-Men alike watch as Luffy tries to obliterate a boat with a barrage of brutal blows!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Fish-Man Island was saved by the timely arrival of the Sea Kings, but all is not well. Luffy lost a lot of blood in his battle with Hordy, and fish-to-human transfusions are strictly forbidden!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: TO THE FUTURE! THE PATH TO THE SUN!

programme.title: Jimbei must decide whether or not to join the Straw Hats, and the grateful citizens of Fish-Man Island host a fabulous banquet in honor of their human heroes!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE SECRET REVEALED! THE TRUTH ABOUT THE ANCIENT WEAPON!

programme.title: Robocop, (1987, Action)
programme.desc: Detroit in the near future. A cop who dies in the line of duty is transformed into a crime-fighting cyborg by the corporation which now runs the police department. The only hitch: this "perfect" cop still seeks revenge on the creeps who mutilated him.

programme.title: Mad Max, (1980, Action)
programme.desc: Max and the gang's worlds converge when the gang wants Max as badly as he wants them, especially after they target him for the death of their former leader.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn, (1996, Vampires)
programme.desc: In this thrilling cult classic, two dangerous outlaw brothers head out on a wild crime spree. After kidnapping a father and his two kids, the bad guys head to a seedy Mexican bar for safety but come face to face with blood-sucking vampires.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 2: Texas Blood Money, (1999, Vampires)
programme.desc: When a gang of bank robbers makes a run for the border, they wander into the wrong bar and mess with the wrong vampires. It's kill-or-be-killed in the ultimate battle to stop these evil creatures and save their own lives!

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 3: Hangman's Daughter, (1999, Vampires)
programme.desc: Set in Mexico in the early 1900s, this prequel to the From Dusk Till Dawn series finds outlaw Johnny Madrid on the run from the hangman, with the hangman's daughter Esmeralda by his side. Together they are faced with the fight of their lives.

programme.title: Mimic, (1997, Creature Features)
programme.desc: From Oscar winning director Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER) comes the ultimate battle between man and nature. Once a miracle of genetic engineering, what was created in the lab has evolved to mimic the most dangerous predator of all—humans.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn, (1996, Vampires)
programme.desc: In this thrilling cult classic, two dangerous outlaw brothers head out on a wild crime spree. After kidnapping a father and his two kids, the bad guys head to a seedy Mexican bar for safety but come face to face with blood-sucking vampires.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 2: Texas Blood Money, (1999, Vampires)
programme.desc: When a gang of bank robbers makes a run for the border, they wander into the wrong bar and mess with the wrong vampires. It's kill-or-be-killed in the ultimate battle to stop these evil creatures and save their own lives!

programme.title: Rootin' Tootin' Rhythm, (1937, Western)
programme.desc: Ranch owner Gene Autry and his pal Frog Millhouse are after cattle rustlers and become mixed up in a comedy of errors when they don the clothes of two dead outlaws, only to learn that the outlaws are really dead sheriffs, dressed in outlaw's clothes!

programme.title: John Sturges' The Hallelujah Trail, (1965, Western)
programme.desc: Chaos reigns on the wide open plains as a host of stars, including Burt Lancaster and Lee Remick, have their eyes set on a shipment of whiskey and let loose in this wild comedy that spoofs nearly every convention of movie westerns.

programme.title: El Paso, (1949, Western)
programme.desc: A lawyer finds that guns speak louder than words when he rids a Western town of its criminal element.

programme.title: The Broken Star, (1956, Western)
programme.desc: A marshal murders a rancher for gold, but is foiled by his assistant.

programme.title: Warlock, (1959, Western)
programme.desc: An ex-outlaw (Richard Widmark) divides and challenges a quick-draw lawman (Henry Fonda) and his sidekick (Anthony Quinn).

programme.title: Johnny Guitar, (1954, Western)
programme.desc: Gambling house operator Vienna seeks control of a town as archrival Emma Small sets out to force Vienna out of town. The timely arrival of Johnny Guitar thwarts Emma's dark plans, but doesn't prevent a showdown between the women.

programme.title: Red River, (1948, Western)
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: The Dark Command, (1940, Western)
programme.desc: A Civil War tale based on the exploits of the notorious outlaw William Quantrill. A courageous sheriff stands up to Quantrill and his band of guerrillas pillaging the countryside in Civil War-torn Kansas, and stops the raids.

programme.title: She's Out of My League, (2009, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: In this comedy, Kirk, an average guy, can’t believe his luck when the successful and gorgeous babe Molly falls for him. His smart-ass friends, his crazy family, and even his obnoxious ex-girlfriend are just as shocked as he is.

programme.title: Ghost Town, (2008, Comedy)
programme.desc: A spirited romantic comedy, Ghost Town is the story of Bertram Pincus, a cranky Manhattan dentist who develops the unwelcome ability to see dead people.

programme.title: I Love You, Man, (2009, Comedy)
programme.desc: A friendless groom-to-be meets the ultimate dude and the two begin a "bro-mance" which takes male-bonding to hilarious new heights that will keep you laughing to the end.

programme.title: She's Out of My League, (2009, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: In this comedy, Kirk, an average guy, can’t believe his luck when the successful and gorgeous babe Molly falls for him. His smart-ass friends, his crazy family, and even his obnoxious ex-girlfriend are just as shocked as he is.

programme.title: Push, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments, (2013, Fantasy)
programme.desc: Clary's life is turned upside down when her mother is kidnapped and it's revealed that they are shadowhunters who are tasked with protecting the world from vampires, werewolves and demons. Clary must discover her talents and save her mother.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement, (2000, Action)
programme.desc: Colonel Terry Childers is a patriot and war hero. But when a peacekeeping mission he leads in Yemen goes terribly wrong, he finds himself facing a court-martial.

programme.title: Traitor, (2008, Thriller)
programme.desc: When straight arrow FBI agent Roy Clayton (Guy Pearce of MOMENTO) heads up the investigation into a dangerous international conspiracy, all clues seem to lead back to former U.S. Special Operations officer, Samir Horn (Don Cheadle of CRASH).

programme.title: Separated from their children, Maggie, Gabriel and Rosita track a military convoy to a mysterious destination; Ezekiel, Kelly, Negan and Annie find themselves at a work site; Daryl and Carol follow a train that has taken Connie aboard.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Ezekiel and Negan team up to lead a clandestine labor revolt against the warden; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah catch up with Luke and Jules fleeing Oceanside; Eugene stands trial with Yumiko as his defense attorney.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Alexandrians and the prisoners head back to the Commonwealth to confront Pamela Milton; a swarm approaches the city.

programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Daryl and Negan rush to the Commonwealth to stop Hornsby from going after their families; Pamela deals with protestors demanding justice for Sebastian's crimes; Mercer needs Rosita's help to fight a swarm.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Carol makes a deal with Pamela to wipe the slate clean on behalf of her friends; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah get on the road to Oceanside to fill them in on a plan; the Commonwealth celebrates Founders Day.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Eugene goes on the run after the Founders Day incident; Pamela tasks Mercer to investigate his whereabouts, to Max and Princess' dismay; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah encounter an unusual complication at an abandoned Renaissance Faire.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Daryl and Carol investigate the whereabouts of their friends after Pamela disappears them from the Commonwealth; Pamela asks Yumiko to prosecute Eugene on behalf of the Commonwealth.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Rick searches for his family after emerging from a coma; Morgan and Duane help teach Rick the new rules for survival.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Rick unknowingly causes a group of survivors to be trapped by walkers; Rick must confront an enemy more dangerous than the undead.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Rick goes back to Atlanta to save a man's life; Lori and Shane deal with the surprise return of someone they thought was dead.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Another group of survivors threatens Rick, Daryl, T-Dog and Glenn, sending Rick's mission to Atlanta awry; Jim becomes unhinged back at camp.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Rick leads the group to the CDC hoping to cure an infected Jim, who must make a terrible life-and-death decision.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Rick and the group are allowed into the CDC by a strange doctor; all is not what it seems in their newfound haven.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Zirconia threatens the Amazon Trio that if they don’t capture Pegasus by the next new moon, the magic making them human will wear off.
programme.sub-title: Mirrors of Dreams: The Amazon's Last Stage

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends go to see a show at the Dead Moon Circus. But Momo starts acting peculiar and leaves, causing Chibi-Usa to become worried.
programme.sub-title: The Amazoness: Nightmare from Behind the Mirrors

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami falls in love with a melody she finds online. She works on lyrics that match the melody and also goes to meet the composer, Toshiyuki Nishino.
programme.sub-title: True Power Explodes: Ami's Melody of the Heart

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rei becomes famous after posing for a magazine. A girl named Nanako, expresses her desire to study under Rei so that she can become just like her.
programme.sub-title: Flames of Passion: Mars's Raging Super Attack

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.desc: 2009. Um homem que, após a morte da sua esposa, descobre que ela tinha um amante há vários anos, embarca numa viagem que o leva a Inglaterra, Alemanha e Itália para encontrar o amante da sua esposa e descobrir toda a verdade sobre aquela mulher. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Liam Neeson, Antonio Banderas, Laura Linney, Romola Garai, Abigail Canton, Pam Ferris, Paterson Joseph, Craig Parkinson, Lola Peploe, Sophie Wu Diretor: Richard Eyre

programme.title: Sem Lei, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Um grupo de três amigos planeja um grande roubo que acaba dando errado quando um deles se revela um traidor. Enganado, Sonny decide assumir o problema de frente e busca vingança contra o antigo parceiro. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Bruce, Phillippe, Ryan, Willis Diretor: Mike Gunther

programme.title: Redenção, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Jason Statham é um veterano de guerra que assume uma nova identidade enquanto tenta se vingar dos assassinos de sua namorada grávida. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Agata Buzek, Jason Statham Diretor: Steven Knight

programme.title: O Sequestro do Ônibus 657, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Um pai não tem meios para pagar o tratamento médico da filha. Como último recurso, ele se une a um colega de trabalho ganancioso para roubar um cassino. Quando as coisas dão errado, eles são forçados a sequestrar um ônibus da cidade. programme.title: Cidade Fantasma, (2003)
programme.desc: 2003. Um vigarista que está foragido da polícia nos EUA viaja para o Camboja para receber sua parte em um golpe de seguro, mas descobre mais do que esperava. Agora, ele terá que usar sua habilidade criminosa para realizar um plano ousado e sair dessa. programme.title: Paixão à Flor da Pele, (2004)
programme.desc: 2004. Quando a namorada Lisa desaparece misteriosamente, Matthew inicia uma busca obsessiva para encontrá-la, sem sucesso. Anos depois, sua vida se estabiliza e ele fica noivo. programme.desc: 2004. Para a Gangue dos 5, tudo é um videogame: matar policiais, armar emboscadas e criar requintes de crueldade. programme.desc: 1968. Do diretor Roman Polanski, o arrepiante clássico que deu origem a uma nova direção do terror. Do romance campeão de vendas de Ira Levin, "O Bebê de Rosemary" conta a história de jovens recém-casados que esperam seu primeiro filho. Como toda mãe de primei Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Ruth Gordon, Sidney Blackmer, Mia Farrow, John Cassavetes, Maurice Evans, Ralph Bellamy, Victoria Vetri, Patsy Kelly, Elisha Cook Jr., Emmaline Henry Diretor: Roman Polanski

programme.title: Fogo no Céu, (1993)
programme.desc: 1993. Em 1975, o madeireiro Travis Walton (D.B. Sweeney) e seus colegas descobriram um OVNI. Seus amigos escaparam, mas Walton não teve a mesma sorte. Ele foi capturado pela estranha nave, exposto a vários estudos médicos dolorosos e sinistros. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: D. B. Sweeney, Peter Berg, James Garner, Craig Sheffer, Robert Patrick, Henry Thomas, Bradley Gregg, Noble Willingham, Kathleen Wilhoite, Georgia Emelin Diretor: Robert Lieberman

programme.title: Curso de Verão, (1987)
programme.desc: 1987. Começaram as férias e o professor de educação física de Ocean Front High, Freddy Shoop, tem grandes planos: passar o verão no Havaí. Mas o vice-presidente da escola tem outros planos para Freddy: uma posição como o professor de inglês no curso de férias. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Kirstie Alley, Mark Harmon, Courtney Thorne-Smith, Robin Thomas, Shawnee Smith, Patrick Laborteaux, Dean Cameron, Gary Riley, Kelly Minter, Ken Olandt Diretor: Carl Reiner

programme.title: Viagem ao Mundo dos Sonhos, (1985)
programme.desc: 1985. Em um laboratório improvisado, três garotos utilizam uma descoberta incrível e sua engenhosidade para construírem sua própria espaçonave e lançarem-se em uma fantástica jornada interplanetária. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Ethan Hawke, River Phoenix, Jason Presson, Amanda Peterson, Dick Miller, Robert Picardo, Leslie Rickert, James Cromwell, Dana Ivey, Bobby Fite Diretor: Joe Dante

programme.title: Brincando com Fogo, (1986)

programme.title: Conte Comigo, (2000)
programme.desc: 2000. Sammy e Terry mantêm um vínculo inquebrável desde que ficaram órfãos, anos antes. Depois de levar um estilo de vida despreocupado, o irmão rebelde volta para a vida de Sammy e de seu filho Rudy. programme.title: À Prova de Fogo, (2009)

programme.desc: 2021. Há 15 anos, Ben Walker deixou sua namorada, sua cidade e seu ministério por uma oportunidade de negócios. Agora ele tem uma sólida carreira e uma noiva. Um dia ele é visitado por um anjo que mostra como seria sua vida se ele tivesse seguido seu chamado. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Kevin Sorbo, Kristy Swanson, John Ratzenberger Diretor: Dallas Jenkins

programme.desc: 2006. Dan Millman é um atleta que tem dinheiro, mulheres perseguindo-o e aptidões para participar das Olimpíadas. programme.title: Martinho Lutero, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. Veja os principais locais da vida de Lutero, Eisleben sua cidade natal; Erfurt onde atuou no mosteiro; Worms, cenário da famosa dieta; Castelo de Wartburg onde foi prisioneiro e Wittenberg, onde realizou maior parte de seus trabalhos. Gêneros: Faith & Spirituality

programme.title: Dreamgirls: Em Busca de um Sonho, (2006)

Com performances espetaculares de um elenco de estrelas, Dreamgirls faz enorme sucesso com a história incrível de três cantoras que aprendem que tudo é possível quando você segue os seus sonhos. programme.title: Norman - Confie em Mim, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Norman Oppenheimer é um picareta do mercado financeiro que tenta sua sorte na cidade de Nova York. Tentando ser amigo de todos, ele força seu caminho até se infiltrar no círculo interno de ricaços e de figurões da política. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Robo-Dog, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O cãozinho de Tyler sofre uma morte trágica, deixando o garoto extremamente entristecido. Usando uma superbateria, Tom, o pai de Tyler, cria um cão-robô para o filho. O problema é que o chefe de Tom está disposto a tudo para obter a superbateria. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Loucas por Amor, Viciadas em Dinheiro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois que seu marido perde o emprego, a dona de casa Bridget é forçada a assumir um trabalho como auxiliar de limpeza na Casa da Moeda em Kansas City, Missouri, e acaba planejando o roubo de uma fortuna em notas gastas destinadas à destruição. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Uma Viagem para a Espanha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Steve Coogan e Rob Brydon conhecem restaurantes e hotéis da costa espanhola, trocando piadas e impressões sobre seus almoços, conversando sobre paternidade, masculinidade e envelhecimento. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Doutor da Felicidade, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Doutor Knock é um ex-bandido que se tornou um médico e chega à pequena aldeia de Saint-Maurice para fazer os moradores acreditarem que não são saudáveis e, assim, poder exercer sua profissão de forma lucrativa. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Segurança Nacional, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Incomodados pela criação da lei que permite a derrubada de aviões no espaço aéreo nacional, traficantes planejam ataques terroristas contra o Sistema de Vigilância da Amazônia. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Teia de Corrupção, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O lutador Liam sai da prisão com o único desejo de reatar o laço com seu filho. Mas, quando seu irmão se envolve com criminosos de alto escalão, ele não vê alternativa a não ser se arriscar novamente. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Tekken, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. No ano de 2039, o lutador de rua Jin testemunha o assassinato de sua mãe pela Tekken, a mais terrível das corporações que dominam o mundo. Ele parte para a vingança buscando sagrar-se campeão em um mortal torneio de luta. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Infiltrado, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um bandido ferido durante uma batida policial é levado ao hospital, onde recusa atendimento médico para ganhar tempo e permitir que seus comparsas o resgatem. Um detetive percebe suas intenções decide usá-lo para prender a gangue inteira. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Donnie Darko, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Donnie Darko não se dá bem com sua família, seus professores ou seus colegas de classe, mas acaba encontrando uma amiga em Gretchen. Seu outro amigo, porém, não é tão confiável assim: trata-se de Frank, um coelho gigante que só ele pode ver. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Os Intrusos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um grupo de amigos, na década de 1990, acredita ter encontrado o roubo perfeito: uma casa vazia com um cofre cheio de dinheiro. Quando o casal de idosos que ali mora chega mais cedo, a situação se inverte de repente. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Era da Escuridão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Na década de 1920, durante a ocupação japonesa da Coreia e da China, guerreiros enfrentam policiais e agentes japoneses tentando contrabandear explosivos pela fronteira e utilizando meios violentos para alcançar os seus objetivos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Uma Beleza Fantástica, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um conto de fadas contemporâneo sobre o surgimento de uma amizade improvável entre uma jovem solitária que sonha ser autora de livros infantis e um viúvo rabugento. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Três Ladrões e um Bebê, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O compulsivo jogador Slipper vê o sequestro do neto de um magnata a salvação de suas dívidas. Quando, junto com seu senhorio e o oportunista Octopus, sequestra BB, sem saber, frustram os planos do crime organizado, que também está atrás da criança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Morte Anda a Cavalo, (1967)
programme.desc: 1967. Bill Meceita testemunha o assassinato de sua família quando criança e cresce com desejo de vingança. Ele se une a Ryan, um pistoleiro, e saem à procura do bandido Walcot, mas ele logo descobre que Ryan esconde um segredo sobre o seu passado. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Anthony Dawson, Carlo Pisacane, Franco Balducci, John Phillip Law, José Torres, Lee Van Cleef, Luigi Pistilli, Mario Brega Diretor: Giulio Petroni

programme.title: Joe, o Pistoleiro Implacável, (1966)
programme.desc: 1966. O bando do impiedoso Duncan massacra uma tribo de índios Navajo inclusive mulheres e crianças apenas para conseguir e depois vender escalpos. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Aldo Sambrell, Urt Reynolds, Fernando Rey, Franca Polesello, Lucia Modugno, Nicoletta Machiavelli, Pierre Cressoy, Tanya Lopert Diretor: Sergio Corbucci

programme.title: The Unforgiven, (1960)

Gêneros: Western Elenco: Albert Salmi, Audie Murphy, Audrey Hepburn, Burt Lancaster, Charles Bickford, John Saxon, Joseph Wiseman, Lillian Gish Diretor: John Huston

programme.title: Com a Corda no Pescoço, (1978)
programme.desc: 1978. Condenado à forca, Henry Moon é capturado enquanto tentava fugir para o México, mas descobre que existe uma lei local que perdoa os crimes de quem se casa com uma mulher solteira ou viúva. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Christopher Lloyd, Danny Devito, Jack Nicholson, John Belushi, Mary Steenburgen, Richard Bradford, Tracey Walter, Veronica Cartwright, Jeff Morris, Danny DeVito Diretor: Jack Nicholson

programme.title: Gringo, Reze para Morrer, (1968)
programme.desc: 1968. À frente de uma dúzia de bandidos, dois irmãos mantêm a pequena cidade de White City sob controle. Finalmente, porém, um caçador de recompensas, com a ajuda de um aleijado, tenta libertar White City de seus ferozes opressores. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Charles Southwood, Jeff Cameron, Cristina Penz, Massimo Righi, Calisto Calisti, Ettore Manni, Mel Gaines, Fabio Testi, Simonetta Vitelli, Amerigo Castrighella Diretor: Demofilo Fidani

programme.title: Django Atira Primeiro, (1966)
programme.desc: 1966. Django sai a procura de seu pai que teve a cabeça colocada à prêmio, e chega tarde demais, pois ele fora assassinado por um caçador de recompensas. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Alberto Lupo, Erika Blanc, Evelyn Stewart, Fernando Sancho, Glenn Saxson, John Hart, Nando Gazzolo Diretor: Alberto De Martino

programme.title: Legião Invencível, (1949)
programme.desc: 1949. A poucos dias de sua aposentadoria, o capitão da cavalaria Nathan Brittles descobre que os índios atacaram um pelotão. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Ben Johnson, George O'Brien, Harry Carey Jr., Joanne Dru, John Agar, John Wayne, Mildred Natwick, Victor Mclaglen Diretor: John Ford

programme.title: Uma Longa Fila de Cruzes, (1969)

Gêneros: Western Elenco: Anthony Steffen, William Berger, Nicoletta Machiavelli, Mariangela Giordano, Franco Ukmar, Giulio Mauroni, Gabriele Torrei, Giancarlo Sisti, Giorgio Dolfin, Mario Brega Diretor: Sergio Garrone

programme.title: A Marca da Forca, (1968)
programme.desc: 1968. Eles o cravaram de balas. Eles o penduraram pelo pescoço. Eles o deixaram para morrer. Mas eles cometeram dois erros fatais: eles tentaram enforcar o homem errado, e não terminaram o trabalho. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Ben Johnson, Bruce Dern, Charles Mcgraw, Clint Eastwood, Ed Begley, Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Ruth White Diretor: Ted Post

programme.title: Rastros de Ódio, (1956)

programme.title: Um Homem Dificil de Matar, (2003)

programme.title: O Resgate do Bandoleiro, (1957)

programme.title: Crimes Obscuros, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. O policial Tadek investiga um caso de assassinato não resolvido e encontra semelhanças do crime em um livro do artista polonês Krystov Kozlow. programme.title: American Poltergeist - Possuídos, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. Ted e Lauren alugam uma velha casa no campo, de um homem chamado Jim, para trabalhar em seu estudo. À medida que o tempo passa, o casal se torna cada vez mais desconfiado dos acontecimentos e do estranho comportamento de seu anfitrião. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Justin Arnold, Andrea Nelson, Don Scribner, Michael Phillip Edwards, Jack Hunter, Carolyn Ratteray, Jonathan Brooks Diretor: Susannah O Brien

programme.title: A Maldição do Jerunei, (2023)
programme.desc: 2023. Este filme conta a história do passado do povo Melanau, que é cheia de mistério, especialmente em relação aos costumes funerários dos nobres do povo. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Bront Palarae, Uqasha Senrose, Mohd Syafie Naswip, Amerul Affendi, Daiyan Trisha Diretor: Jason Chong

programme.title: Carnivore: Um Lobisomem de Londres, (2017)
programme.desc: 2017. programme.title: Aranhas!, (2021)

Agora o Rei Arthur deve se reunir com o mago Merlin e os Cavaleiros da Távola Redonda e lutar para recuperar sua coroa. programme.desc: 1993. Tartarugas Ninja buscam novo lar nos esgotos de Nova York e enfrentam o Destruidor, que usa o Ooze para criar capangas. Com ajuda de April, Jordan e Keno, precisam detê-lo. programme.desc: 2011. Marisa Cortez Wilson é casada com Wilbur, um repórter conhecido por desmascarar espiões, e com ele tem um bebê e duas crianças. programme.desc: 2003. programme.title: Deus da guerra, (2017)
programme.desc: 2017. Na dinastia Ming, onde o jovem general Qi Jiguang conquista uma importante vitória contra os piratas japoneses, comandando o exército chinês. Quando, quatro anos depois, sua nação é mais uma vez atacada, Qi se vê obrigado a retornar aos campos de batalha. programme.desc: 2015. Milhares de anos no futuro, um pai, um filho e seu cachorro viajam pelo mundo contando histórias do passado que levaram à destruição da humanidade. programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Matilda está prestes a contar toda a verdade a Rodrigo, mas ele se distrai olhando para a amiga dela, Maricarmen. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Encontrando o Amor em Sugarcreek, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Pai e filho fugindo de uma tragédia chocante e brutal se instalam na cidade predominantemente amish de Sugarcreek, Ohio. Eles são acolhidos por três irmãs que oferecem ao pai um trabalho de faz-tudo, mas uma policial local começa a desconfiar. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Encontrando o Amor em Nebraska, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Kennedy Blaine, uma garota californiana, herda uma fazenda na pequena cidade de Valentine em Nebraska. Antes de vender a propriedade, ela decide passar ali o verão para aprender mais sobre sua família. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Arriscando a Sorte, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois de viver por anos em Nova York com documentos falsos, Camilo Sanz recebe um aviso de deportação. Desesperado, ele pega dinheiro emprestado com um perigoso agiota do bairro para fazer um casamento falso com uma conhecida e evitar ser deportado. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Americano, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. De férias na Espanha, jovem recém-formado encontra uma linda mulher e um enigmático homem que o faz repensar seu futuro. Uma carreira rápida o espera quando retornar para a América, mas ele pensa deve se arriscar tudo e ir pelo caminho mais curto. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Um Porto Seguro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma mulher misteriosa se muda para uma pequena cidade e recomeça sua vida. Apesar da moça estar determinada a não formar laços afetivos na nova cidade, ela não consegue cumprir esse objetivo e acaba levantando questionamentos sobre seu passado. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Carol, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Therese Belivet tem um emprego entediante em uma loja de departamentos. Um dia, ela conhece Carol, uma elegante e misteriosa cliente. Rapidamente, as duas mulheres desenvolvem um vínculo amoroso que terá consequências sérias. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Obsessão Perigosa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mike está na casa dos 50 anos e sente que seu casamento está cada vez mais frio. Com a chegada de novos vizinhos, ele começa a observar a rotina do jovem casal. Após conhecer melhor Jenna, Mike passa a se relacionar secretamente com a jovem. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Jovem Rainha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Cristina, rainha da Suécia, foi criada como um príncipe. Inspirada pela filosofia, ela enfrenta grande resistência às suas ideias de modernizar o país. Além dos problemas políticos, Cristina ainda precisa lidar com sua atração por uma dama. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Obsessão Perigosa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mike está na casa dos 50 anos e sente que seu casamento está cada vez mais frio. Com a chegada de novos vizinhos, ele começa a observar a rotina do jovem casal. Após conhecer melhor Jenna, Mike passa a se relacionar secretamente com a jovem. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jacob confessa a sua infidelidade a Lerato e parte; Prospero tenta subornar Glenda e oferece o seu trabalho em troca de informações; Jacob apoia o seu irmão e investe na empresa de segurança que acaba de criar. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jacob e Folaké vão a Lagos para discutir a herança com Glenda; Prospero tem um encontro com o Andile por causa do roubo; Folaké descobre que Bigelow ordenou o ataque à plataforma petrolífera. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Bola é acusada; Jacob percebe que ainda está apaixonado por Zanèlé; Bola chega a Joanesburgo; Prospero é apanhado subornando o ministro; Prospero ataca Jacob. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O bebé é raptado. A polícia aconselha Lerato a reportar o ocorrido à imprensa; Jacob recebe um pedido de resgate de 2 milhões; Bola foge com Joe. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Abayomi revela à sua filha que Jacob também é seu filho; Abayomi decide deixar Lagos; Jacob vai para a prisão com sua mãe para dar as boas-vindas ao seu irmão Andile. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Baile de Formatura, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Alunos do último ano do ensino médio a caminho do baile são sequestrados por um assassino psicótico. Enquanto ele tortura os adolescentes, eles se voltam uns contra os outros para sobreviver. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Relógio Encantado, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Angel é uma garota tímida que odeia dizer não. Ela encontra um relógio mágico que realiza desejos e a torna incrivelmente popular. Mas essa nova vida talvez não a deixe realmente feliz. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Onde Fica o Paraíso, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Durante a II Guerra Mundial, uma pesquisadora durona e solitária abriga um menino fugindo dos bombardeios em Londres. Aos poucos, ela acaba por abrir seu coração em uma emocionante jornada de amizade e imaginação. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Alex Rider Contra o Tempo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Alex Rider, adolescente britânico habilidoso em linguística, mergulho, artes marciais e tiro, é recrutado pelo MI6. Sua primeira missão é investigar o bilionário Darrius Sayle, que fez suspeitas doações de megacomputadores às escolas da Inglaterra. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Doutor da Felicidade, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Doutor Knock é um ex-bandido que se tornou um médico e chega à pequena aldeia de Saint-Maurice para fazer os moradores acreditarem que não são saudáveis e, assim, poder exercer sua profissão de forma lucrativa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Uma Paixão em Seoul, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Kim é uma jovem filipina que vive com seus pais superprotetores. Quando descobre uma vaga para ensinar inglês a um empresário em Seul, ela foge para uma vida nova. Ela só não espera viver um triângulo amoroso com seu aluno e o assistente dele. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Uma Viagem para a Espanha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Steve Coogan e Rob Brydon conhecem restaurantes e hotéis da costa espanhola, trocando piadas e impressões sobre seus almoços, conversando sobre paternidade, masculinidade e envelhecimento. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Tuff Turf - O Rebelde, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Prestes a terminar o ensino médio, Morgan é obrigado a mudar seu estilo de vida ao trocar de escola. Lá, ele acaba se envolvendo com a namorada do líder de uma gangue. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Life - Um Retrato de James Dean, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1955, o fotógrafo Dennis Stock acompanha James Dean em uma viagem para a fazenda da família do ator. No local, Stock registra as imagens mais famosas de toda a carreira de Dean. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A História de Esau, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois de anos ausente, escritor retorna à casa da família em Israel para cuidar do pai doente. Lá ele enfrenta seu irmão mais novo amargurado, que assumiu toda a responsabilidade pela padaria da família e se casou com a mulher a quem ambos amavam. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Cordeiros e Carrascos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um advogado resolve trabalhar no caso de um guarda de prisão da África do Sul que se traumatizou pelas execuções em que participou. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Enquanto Houver Esperança, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Angélica é uma adolescente de 16 anos que luta contra uma forma rara de câncer. E, enquanto seus pais batalham para custear seu tratamento e ganhar mais tempo de vida para a garota, ela se apaixona pela primeira vez. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 1985. Um trio de vilhões chamadas "As Graciosas" atrai jovens para uma danceteria e os envenena com uma poção, transformando-os em lobisomens. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo

programme.title: 2010. Cartman quer se tornar um corredor da NASCAR, mas ele acha que não tem condições porque não é "pobre e suficientemente estúpido" para alcançar seus sonhos. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker

programme.title: 2010. A verdadeira identidade de Mysterion finalmente é revelada. Enquanto isso, Guaxinim, desprezado por seus amigos super-heróis, está com sede de vingança.
